data.title: EU AI Act — GPAI Obligations & AIBOM Relevance
data.abstractNote: GPAI obligations effective Aug 2025. High-risk enforcement Aug 2026. Digital Omnibus may push Annex III to Dec 2027. Context for AIBOM regulatory drivers. Session H monitoring.

data.title: AIBoMGen: Generating an AI Bill of Materials (CAIN 2026)
data.abstractNote: Automated signed AIBOM generation with cryptographic hashing, digital signatures, in-toto attestations. CAIN 2026 (Apr 12-13, Rio). Session H update: confirmed venue.
data.conferenceName: 5th International Conference on AI Engineering, Rio de Janeiro

data.title: CycloneDX v1.7 (ECMA-424) — ML-BOM, Citations, Crypto
data.abstractNote: Final 1.x release (Oct 2025). ML-BOM since v1.5. v1.7 adds Citations (provenance of BOM data), patent fields, expanded crypto. 2026: Transparency Exchange Language (superset with AI/agentic capabilities). Session H monitoring update.

data.title: SPDX 3.0.1 — AI Profile
data.abstractNote: SPDX AI namespace for documenting AI system artifacts: training data, model architecture, energy consumption, personal data usage. ISO/IEC 5962:2021. Session H monitoring update.

data.title: OWASP GenAI Security Project
data.abstractNote: Parent project for AIBOM Generator, Top 10 for LLMs, Agentic Application Security. 10 strategic workstreams. RSAC 2026 (Mar 23-26). Session H monitoring update.

data.title: OWASP AIBOM Generator (Hugging Face)
data.abstractNote: Open-source AIBOM generator for Hugging Face models. Introduced RSAC 2025, contributed to OWASP GenAI Security Project. AIBOM Generation Handbook in development. Session H monitoring update.

data.title: AI4LAM / Fantastic Futures 2026 (Washington DC, Sep 14-18)
data.abstractNote: International AI for LAM conference. 2026 edition in Washington DC. AI4LAM forming as official membership org hosted by National Library of Norway.

data.title: C2PA Technical Specification v2.2
data.abstractNote: Current published version (May 1, 2025). v2.3 explainer available. Fast-tracked as ISO standard. Session H monitoring update.

data.title: HN: 1M Context GA Discussion (2026-03-14)
data.abstractNote: 41 substantive comments on context window scaling, agent infrastructure, and production deployment patterns.

data.title: pyzotero
data.abstractNote: Python wrapper for Zotero API v3.

data.title: rocrate-zenodo
data.abstractNote: Python tool for depositing RO-Crates to Zenodo.

data.title: ro-crate-py
data.abstractNote: Python library for creating/manipulating RO-Crates.

data.title: WorkflowHub Registry
data.abstractNote: FAIR workflow registry using RO-Crate.

data.title: Workflow Run RO-Crate (PLoS ONE 2024)
data.abstractNote: RO-Crate profile for recording workflow execution provenance. Key for Gap 2.

data.title: RO-Crate Specification
data.abstractNote: Research Object Crate — packaging standard for research data. Common Provenance Model RO-Crate confirmed live (Session G).

data.title: protocols.io — Protocol Publication Platform
data.abstractNote: Open platform for protocol publication and versioning. API at apidoc.protocols.io.

data.title: REPRODUCE-ME Ontology
data.abstractNote: PROV-O/P-Plan extension for experiment reproducibility. ProvBook tool for Jupyter notebook provenance. Near-tier provenance cluster.

data.title: ELN Consortium — .eln File Format
data.abstractNote: Electronic Lab Notebook file format based on RO-Crate. IANA media type: application/vnd.eln+zip. Third independent RO-Crate convergence point (Gap 2).

data.title: FAIR Guiding Principles
data.abstractNote: Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable data principles.

data.title: CONSORT-AI Reporting Guideline
data.abstractNote: Reporting guideline for AI in clinical trials.

data.title: IIIF Consortium — International Image Interoperability Framework
data.abstractNote: 70-member global consortium. Presentation API v3 current, v4 release candidate (target June 2026).

data.title: CIDOC-CRM v7.3.2 (ISO 21127:2023)
data.abstractNote: Conceptual Reference Model for cultural heritage. Published March 2026. SIG meetings: Oxford (Mar 23-26), Nuremberg (Oct 6-9).

data.title: NIST AI RMF 1.0 — AI Risk Management Framework
data.abstractNote: NIST AI Risk Management Framework. Published January 2023. GenAI Profile: AI 600-1 (2024). Cyber AI Profile: IR 8596 (preliminary draft).

data.title: AIBoMGen: Generating an AI Bill of Materials
data.abstractNote: Tool and methodology for generating AIBOMs.

data.title: Operationalising Artificial Intelligence Bills of Materials
data.abstractNote: Accepted January 2026.

data.title: OWASP AIBOM Project
data.abstractNote: OWASP project for AI Bill of Materials. Includes AIBOM Generator tool.

data.title: Records in Contexts Ontology (RiC-O)
data.abstractNote: International Council on Archives ontology for archival description. GitHub: ICA-EGAD/RiC-O.

data.title: E-ARK Specifications (OAIS Implementation)
data.abstractNote: European Archival Records and Knowledge Foundation.

data.title: OAIS Reference Model (ISO 14721:2025 / CCSDS 650.0-M-2)
data.abstractNote: Open Archival Information System reference model. ISO 14721:2025 (published Dec 2024). Foundation for Gap 5 (Designated Community mapping).

data.title: C2PA for G+LAM Community Group (Library of Congress)
data.abstractNote: Library of Congress initiative for C2PA in galleries, libraries, archives, and museums. Founded January 2025.

data.title: c2pa-python (Content Authenticity SDK)
data.abstractNote: Python SDK for C2PA content provenance.

data.title: C2PA Technical Specification v2.3
data.abstractNote: Content provenance and authenticity standard. Active draft, December 2025.

data.title: Agent-OSI Reference Architecture (arXiv:2602.13795)
data.abstractNote: OSI-inspired layered reference architecture for AI agents.

data.title: Security Threat Modeling for Agent Protocols (arXiv:2602.11327)
data.abstractNote: Security threat modeling for A2A and Agora protocols.

data.title: VASPilot: MCP-Facilitated Multi-Agent Intelligence for Autonomous VASP Simulations
data.abstractNote: MCP-facilitated multi-agent system for materials science (VASP simulations).

data.title: A Study on the MCP × A2A Framework for Enhancing Interoperability
data.abstractNote: Analysis of MCP and A2A protocol interoperability.

data.title: TIB AIssistant: a Platform for AI-Supported Research
data.abstractNote: AI-supported research platform from TIB Hannover. ISWC 2025 (Nara, Japan). Uses ORKG for structured scholarly knowledge.

data.title: R-LAM: Reproducibility-Constrained Large Action Models for Scientific Workflow Automation
data.abstractNote: Reproducibility-constrained framework for LLM-driven scientific workflows. PyPI: pip install rlam.

data.title: LLM Reproducibility Study (ICSE 2026)
data.abstractNote: Empirical LLM reproducibility study for ICSE 2026.

data.title: The Reproducibility Crisis in LLM Research
data.abstractNote: Study on reproducibility in LLM research. ICSE 2026.

data.title: Multimodal Provenance-Aware Defense Framework (arXiv:2512.23557)
data.abstractNote: Defense against prompt injection in multi-agent systems using provenance-aware techniques.

data.title: Empowering Scientific Workflows with Federated Agents
data.abstractNote: Federated agent architecture for scientific workflows. Argonne/UChicago. Updated January 2026.

data.title: A Grassroots Network and Community Roadmap for Interconnected Autonomous Science Laboratories
data.abstractNote: Roadmap for interconnected autonomous science labs.

data.title: The (R)evolution of Scientific Workflows in the Agentic AI Era
data.abstractNote: Vision paper on scientific workflows and agentic AI.

data.title: LLM Agents for Interactive Workflow Provenance: Reference Architecture and Evaluation Methodology
data.abstractNote: Reference architecture for LLM agent workflow provenance. SC Workshops '25 (November 2025). v2 confirms MCP architecture.

data.title: PROV-AGENT: Unified Provenance for Tracking AI Agent Interactions
data.abstractNote: Unified provenance model for AI agent interactions. Accepted IEEE e-Science 2025.

data.title: OpenTelemetry GenAI Semantic Conventions
data.abstractNote: CNCF OpenTelemetry semantic conventions for generative AI and agent spans. Key for Gap 3 (PROV-O to OTel mapping).

data.title: AGNTCY (Cisco/Linux Foundation)
data.abstractNote: Open-source agent infrastructure (35+ repos). Includes slim-otel, observe SDK covering all three protocol layers. Founded July 2025 under Linux Foundation.

data.title: SCIM for Agents (IETF draft-abbey-scim-agent-extension)
data.abstractNote: IETF draft extending SCIM 2.0 (RFC 7643) for agent identity.

data.title: IETF agent:// URI Scheme (draft-narvaneni-agent-uri)
data.abstractNote: IETF Internet-Draft for agent:// URI scheme (v02, Oct 2025). See also draft-sogomonian-ai-uri-scheme.

data.title: W3C PROV-O (Provenance Ontology)
data.abstractNote: W3C Recommendation (2013). Core ontology for provenance. Foundation for Gap 1-3 work in ARP project.

data.title: Agent Communication Protocol (ACP)
data.abstractNote: Agent communication protocol. Spec at github.com/agntcy/acp-spec.

data.title: Agent Network Protocol (ANP)
data.abstractNote: Protocol for agent networking and discovery.

data.title: Agora Protocol
data.abstractNote: Agent communication protocol from University of Oxford. Semantic-web-grounded agent discovery and interaction.

data.title: A2A Protocol (Agent-to-Agent) v1.0
data.abstractNote: Agent-to-agent communication protocol. v1.0: TSC formalized (8 companies), JWS signatures, OAuth/PKCE, extensions array confirmed as provenance extension insertion point.

data.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Specification
data.abstractNote: Protocol for LLM-to-tool integration. Current spec Nov 2025. Session G: ecosystem fracture signal (Perplexity CTO departure, context window consumption issues).

data.title: ORNL INTERSECT
data.abstractNote: Oak Ridge National Laboratory's open federated architecture for interconnected science ecosystems.

data.title: W3C WebAgents Community Group
data.abstractNote: W3C community group for web-based agent standards.

data.title: Agentic AI Foundation (AAIF)
data.abstractNote: Directed fund under Linux Foundation providing neutral governance for open-source agentic AI infrastructure. Founded December 9, 2025.
